servers.name: whoop
servers.description: Biometric data from WHOOP wearable. Recovery, sleep, strain, workouts.

tools.name: whoop_get_profile
tools.description: Get the user's WHOOP profile (user id, email, first/last name).

tools.name: whoop_list_recoveries
tools.description: List daily recovery scores over a date range. Recovery is a 0-100 score reflecting readiness from HRV, RHR, and sleep. Use for 'how recovered am I', 'recovery trend', 'readiness'.

tools.name: whoop_list_sleep
tools.description: List sleep sessions over a date range. Includes sleep performance, efficiency, stages, time in bed. Use for 'how did I sleep', 'sleep score', 'REM/deep sleep'.

tools.name: whoop_get_sleep
tools.description: Get a single sleep session by id with full detail.

tools.name: whoop_list_workouts
tools.description: List workouts over a date range. Includes sport, duration, strain, HR zones, kilojoules. Use for 'workouts this week', 'my runs', 'strain from lifting'.

tools.name: whoop_list_cycles
tools.description: List physiological cycles (day-level containers) over a date range. Each cycle has day strain, max HR, avg HR, kilojoules.

tools.name: whoop_get_body_measurement
tools.description: Get the user's height, weight, and max heart rate from WHOOP profile.

servers.name: todoist
servers.description: Task management — inbox, projects, labels, comments.

tools.name: todoist_list_tasks
tools.description: List active tasks filtered by project/section/label. Use for 'show my tasks', 'tasks in Work', 'p1 tasks'.

tools.name: todoist_filter_tasks
tools.description: List tasks matching a Todoist filter query like 'today', 'overdue', '#Work & p1', '@urgent'. Use when the user gives a date/priority/label expression.

tools.name: todoist_create_task
tools.description: Create a new task. Supports content, due date, priority, project, labels.

tools.name: todoist_close_task
tools.description: Mark a task as completed (close it). Use for 'mark X done', 'finish task Y'.

tools.name: todoist_update_task
tools.description: Update an existing task's content, due date, priority, or project.

tools.name: todoist_list_projects
tools.description: List all Todoist projects.

tools.name: todoist_create_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a task or project. Use for attaching context or notes.

tools.name: todoist_reopen_task
tools.description: Reopen a previously closed task.

tools.name: notion_search
tools.description: Search across the user's Notion workspace by keyword. Returns pages and databases.

tools.name: notion_fetch
tools.description: Fetch a specific Notion page or database by id or URL. Returns full content.

tools.name: notion_create_page
tools.description: Create a new Notion page inside a parent page or database.

tools.name: notion_update_page
tools.description: Update properties or body of an existing Notion page.

tools.name: notion_create_database
tools.description: Create a new Notion database with specified properties schema.

tools.name: notion_create_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a Notion page or block.

servers.name: gmail
servers.description: Gmail — search, read, draft, send email.

tools.name: gmail_search
tools.description: Search Gmail by query. Supports Gmail operators (from:, to:, subject:, has:attachment, after:, label:).

tools.name: gmail_get_thread
tools.description: Fetch a full email thread by id with all messages.

tools.name: gmail_create_draft
tools.description: Create a draft email (not sent). Use when the user wants to write an email but not send it yet.

tools.name: gmail_send_email
tools.description: Send an email immediately. Use when the user explicitly says send/email/reply.

tools.name: gmail_list_labels
tools.description: List the user's Gmail labels (system + user-defined).

tools.name: gmail_create_label
tools.description: Create a new Gmail label for organizing mail.

tools.name: calendar_list_events
tools.description: List events on the primary calendar within a time range. Use for 'what's on my calendar', 'meetings today'.

tools.name: calendar_get_event
tools.description: Fetch a specific event by id.

tools.name: calendar_create_event
tools.description: Create a new event with title, start, end, attendees, description.

tools.name: calendar_update_event
tools.description: Update an existing event's time, attendees, or details.

tools.name: calendar_delete_event
tools.description: Delete an event from the calendar.

tools.name: calendar_suggest_time
tools.description: Suggest free 30/60 minute slots between now and a horizon date, respecting existing events.

tools.name: slack_list_channels
tools.description: List all Slack channels the user is in.

tools.name: slack_send_message
tools.description: Send a message to a Slack channel or DM. Use for 'DM alice', 'message #general'.

tools.name: slack_read_channel
tools.description: Read recent messages in a Slack channel. Use for 'what did team say in #eng', 'catch me up on #product'.

tools.name: slack_search
tools.description: Search Slack messages and files by keyword across all channels.

tools.name: slack_get_thread
tools.description: Fetch a full Slack thread by channel + parent message timestamp.

tools.name: slack_upload_file
tools.description: Upload a file to a Slack channel or DM.

tools.name: slack_list_users
tools.description: List workspace users to find someone by name.
